sourceManager.title: Repository Sources
sourceManager.empty: No sources yet. Click the "Add" button to start configuring.
sourceManager.selectSource: Please select a repository source from the list above to view images

compressPage.title: Image Compression
compressPage.dropHint: Drag images here or click to select

convertPage.title: Image Conversion
convertPage.dropHint: Drag images here or click to select

workspace.setupHint: Pick a folder as your Pixuli local image workspace. Images are stored under images/ in that directory.
workspace.setupHintWeb: Create a browser-local workspace (OPFS). Images and index stay on this device; clearing site data may remove the workspace.
workspace.setupHintWebLocal: Web supports local workspace only. Connect a folder on your computer (recommended) or create a browser workspace.
workspace.setupHintMobile: Create a workspace in the app sandbox. Images and index stay in app storage; uninstalling removes the workspace.
workspace.migrationHintMobile: You have {{count}} remote source(s). Create an app local workspace first, then sync.
workspace.migrationLocalHintMobile: Create a workspace in the app sandbox; existing remotes will be bound for sync.
workspace.pushNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to push
workspace.pullNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to pull
workspace.syncNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to sync
workspace.migrationHint: You have {{count}} remote source(s). Choose how to continue:
workspace.migrationLocalHint: Pick a folder as your workspace. Existing remote sources will be bound for sync.
workspace.migrationHintWebLocal: You have {{count}} remote source(s). On Web, choose a local workspace first, then sync.
workspace.migrationLocalHintWeb: Connect a local folder or create a browser workspace; existing remotes will be bound for sync.
workspace.migrationPullAfter: Pull all images from remote after setup (may take a while)
workspace.manageHint: Switching folders uses a new workspace. Disconnect clears saved workspace state and returns to setup (files on disk are not deleted).
workspace.clearConfirm: Disconnect the current workspace? Saved workspace state will be cleared and you will need to pick a folder or create a workspace again. Files on disk will not be deleted.
workspace.welcomeSubtitle: Open or create a local workspace to manage your images.

settings.title: Settings
settings.syncStrategyHint: Sidebar “Sync now” runs with the default direction against the current sync target.
settings.directionBoth: Two-way sync (push pending, then pull remote changes)
settings.singleSyncHint: Only one repository can sync at a time. Pick the active target in the table.
settings.sourcesEmpty: No remote repositories yet. Use the button above to add GitHub or Gitee.
settings.workspaceUnavailable: Local workspace is not supported on this platform.
settings.workspaceNoRemoteHint: No remote repository yet. Add one under Sync and set a sync target.
settings.workspacePhotosEmptyHint: Open Workspace in the sidebar to create or connect a local workspace before browsing images.
settings.docsHint: Read the Pixuli usage tutorial and FAQ on GitHub Wiki.
